---
title: "Modelling Exercise 2"
subtitle: "Recognize the difference between place an presence"
---

## Place or Presence?

When is it appropriate to use an E53 Place and when an E93 Presence?

A place is an extent in space without a temporal dimension.

A presence has both a spatial and temporal dimension. It can be projected onto a spatial extent (place) and a temporal extent (time span).

### Quiz

Do this quiz to check if you can recognize a place from a presence: [https://app.sli.do/event/hJfrRAUyKwLfvD2VMPzyUc/live/polls](https://app.sli.do/event/hJfrRAUyKwLfvD2VMPzyUc/live/polls)
